title: After the Arima Kinen: Ramen to Wash Down the Loss

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser loses to Nice Nature in the
Arima Kinen. After the race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them go out for ramen.
Matikanetannhauser reflects on the race and Nice
Nature's noticeable improvement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Promising herself to do better next time, she
slurps her noodles and prepares for the next race.
